   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY

    ---

                            000 NM NORTHWEST QUADRANT

   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY

REMARKS:
230300Z POSITION NEAR 29.4N 91.1W.
23JUL26. TROPICAL STORM BERTHA (02L), LOCATED APPROXIMATELY 37 NM
SOUTHWEST OF NAS_NEW_ORLEANS , HAS TRACKED WEST-SOUTHWESTWARD AT
12 KNOTS OVER THE PAST SIX HOURS.
MINIMUM CENTRAL PRESSURE AT 230000Z IS 1002 MB. MAXIMUM
SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT AT 230000Z IS 18 FEET. NEXT WARNINGS AT
230900Z, 231500Z, 232100Z AND 240300Z.
//
NNNN
